care.summary: A stunning philodendron with dark green leaves streaked with creamy white pinstripes.
care.light: Bright indirect light; avoid direct sun which may scorch leaves
care.water: Keep soil lightly moist; water when top inch feels dry. Reduce in winter
care.soil: Well-draining aroid mix with perlite, orchid bark, and peat
care.humidity: Moderate to high; benefits from occasional misting or a humidifier
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid fertilizer monthly in spring and summer
care.toxicity: Toxic if ingested; keep away from pets and children
common_issues: Reverting to all-green leaves in low light
Root rot in poorly draining or waterlogged soil
Brown leaf tips from dry air or fluoride in tap water
tips: Wipe leaves gently to keep stripes visible and dust-free
Use filtered or distilled water to prevent tip burn
Provide a moss pole for climbing if desired
Do not expect identical variegation — each leaf is unique
